name: scrapling-quality
description: Quality comparison: with scrapling skill vs without. Tests correct tool selection, error handling, and integration.

evals.name: cloudflare-protection-intro
evals.prompt: 我需要爬一个受Cloudflare保护的网站。我应该用什么工具？web_fetch失败了。
evals.context: User encountered 403 error from web_fetch on a Cloudflare-protected website.
evals.expected_output: Should identify scrapling as the right tool for Cloudflare anti-crawl sites, explain why web_fetch fails, show basic scrape_content usage.

assertions.description: Mentions scrapling or appropriate tool name

evals.name: wechat-article-extraction
evals.prompt: 我想提取一篇微信公众号的文章内容。怎么做？
evals.context: User wants to extract content from a WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) article.
evals.expected_output: Should recognize scrapling does NOT support WeChat. Warn about limitation. Suggest alternatives (Jina Reader, manual copy, etc).

evals.name: chinese-tech-blog-extraction
evals.prompt: 我想从国内技术博客爬内容，这些网站都有反爬保护。有什么工具适合这个场景？
evals.context: User wants to extract content from domestic Chinese tech blogs with anti-crawl protection.
evals.expected_output: Should identify scrapling as suitable tool. Explain why it's good for Chinese sites. Show scrape_with_selector or scrape_content usage. Mention max_chars to control output size.

assertions.description: Mentions scrapling suitability for Chinese sites
Shows code example with proper parameters

evals.name: error-handling-403
evals.prompt: 我试着爬一个网页，但得到403错误。我用了什么工具都失败了。请帮我诊断。
evals.context: User has tried multiple approaches and still gets 403 Forbidden response.
evals.expected_output: Should suggest scrapling with stealthy mode (scrape_with_stealthy). Explain when to use which variant. Mention fallback to proxy or manual copy if all else fails.

assertions.description: Recognizes 403 as anti-crawl, not a general error

evals.name: integration-with-industry-analysis
evals.prompt: 我在做行业动态监控。想自动爬取竞品博客和新闻网站的内容，然后用LLM分析。怎样集成到我的工作流里？
evals.context: User is building an industry monitoring system that combines web scraping + LLM analysis.
evals.expected_output: Should explain scrapling as the scraping layer. Show integration with industry-analysis workflow. Discuss error handling, caching, rate limiting, and passing results to LLM for analysis.

assertions.description: Discusses error handling or retry strategy
